title: Marketplace Manager - Melorra Capital India - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Melorra Capital India - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Melorra Capital India! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Delhi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Melorra Capital India:
Melorra Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Melorra Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
